exclusion_result.name: Driving without a valid and effective driving licence
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident does not indicate any issue with the driver's license validity.

exclusion_result.name: Mechanical or electrical breakdown
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The damage was caused by a collision, but mechanical failure could be a factor if further investigation reveals it.

exclusion_result.name: Consequential or indirect loss
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The claim may involve indirect losses due to the accident, which this exclusion addresses.

exclusion_result.name: War, invasion and nuclear risk
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: This exclusion does not appear to apply as the incident is a road accident.

exclusion_result.name: Driving under influence of alcohol, drugs or intoxicants
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: There is no information indicating the driver was under the influence, but it may need verification.

exclusion_result.name: Normal wear and tear and gradual deterioration
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The damage described is from a collision, but wear and tear could be a factor in assessing the overall damage.

exclusion_result.name: Damage occurring outside the geographical coverage area (India)
exclusion_result.clause_ref: Policy Schedule — Geographical Area of Cover
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident occurred within India, so this exclusion does not apply.

exclusion_result.name: Vehicle driven by person not authorised by insured
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The driver must be verified as authorized by the insured, which is currently unknown.

exclusion_result.name: Use of vehicle beyond the limitations of use stated in the policy
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident description does not indicate commercial use, but this needs to be confirmed.

exclusion_result.name: Use of vehicle for racing or speed testing
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident does not suggest racing, making this exclusion likely irrelevant.

exclusion_result.name: Loss or damage intentionally caused by the insured
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: There is no indication of intentional damage by the insured in this incident.

waiting_period.note: Waiting period has elapsed. Policy has been in force for 848 days at the incident date.

signals.label: Back-to-Back Claims
signals.reason: No prior claim within 30 days of this incident on this vehicle.

signals.reason: Fewer than 3 claims for this member in the preceding 12 months.

signals.reason: NCB is 35% on policy but 1 recent claim(s) show ncb_impact = TRUE. Verify whether NCB was protected via NCB_PROTECT add-on.

signals.label: Late Reporting
signals.reason: FNOL received 61 days after the incident date (threshold: 7 days).

signals.label: Cross-Document Field Mismatch
signals.reason: 2 cross-document field mismatch(es) found: vehicle_registration_number, police_station.

signals.label: Narrative Coherence
signals.reason: The claimant's account of the vehicle being stationary and the damage description aligns with the adjuster's observation of a rear-end collision.

signals.label: Key Status Concern (Theft Claims Only)
signals.reason: Not applicable — incident type is not THEFT_COMPLETE.

signals.label: Damage Severity Plausibility
signals.reason: The damage description and adjuster observation are consistent with the severity and type of damage expected from a rear-end collision.
